title: Shrug Mod
description: Adds the discord /shrug, /tableflip, and /unflip functionality to Minecraft chat
body:
Adds the Discord /shrug functionality to Minecraft.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Please note the space in front of my name in the gallery image is not a result of the mod, and I don't know what causes it.
</details>
